### ACC-009

- **Impact:** critical
- **Issue:** Ensure <img> elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
- **Element:** `img[itemprop="contentUrl"]`
- **Full path:** `img[itemprop="contentUrl"]`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/register
- **Reference:** https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/non-text-content
- **Fix:** 
    - Fix any of the following:
        - Element does not have an alt attribute
        - aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
        - aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
        - Element has no title attribute
        - Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

## Security Headers

### SEC-001

- **Impact:** serious
- **Issue:** Missing Content-Security-Policy header
- **Location:** `https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/
- **Reference:** https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/#content-security-policy
- **Fix:** Add a Content-Security-Policy header to restrict which resources the browser is allowed to load, reducing XSS risk.

### SEC-002

- **Impact:** serious
- **Issue:** Missing Strict-Transport-Security header
- **Location:** `https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/
- **Reference:** https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/#strict-transport-security
- **Fix:** Add "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" to enforce HTTPS connections.

### SEC-008

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Missing X-Frame-Options header
- **Location:** `https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/
- **Reference:** https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/#x-frame-options
- **Fix:** Add "X-Frame-Options: DENY" or "SAMEORIGIN" to prevent clickjacking attacks.

### SEC-009

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
- **Location:** `https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/
- **Reference:** https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/#x-content-type-options
- **Fix:** Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff" to prevent MIME type sniffing.

### SEC-010

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Missing Permissions-Policy header
- **Location:** `https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/`
- **URL:** https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/
- **Reference:** https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Permissions-Policy
- **Fix:** Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (e.g. "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()") and reduce the attack surface.

- **Fix:** Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (e.g. "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()") and reduce the attack surface.
